title: DetailViewConfig
description: Defines the drill-through view for a single WorkItem. Separated from blotter-config because it has fundamentally different concerns: sections, field editability, and workflow action buttons. All display and edit logic is config-driven. User-driven branching (choosing destination state) is supported by declaring multiple transitions in workflow-config from the same fromState — each appears as a distinct action button here. Data classification is authoritative in field-type-registry only — this config cannot override it.

workflowType.description: Links this config to WorkItems of this type.

sections.description: Ordered display sections. Each section groups related fields under a heading.

title.description: Section heading (e.g. Trade Details, Counterparty, Settlement Instructions).

layout.description: TWO_COLUMN: fields rendered in a two-column grid. ONE_COLUMN: full-width single column. TABLE: fields rendered as a table (suitable for array-type fields).

collapsible.description: Whether the user can collapse this section.

field.description: Dot-notation path into WorkItem.fields or a top-level WorkItem property (e.g. status, priorityLevel). Resolved by FieldPathResolver.

formatter.description: Display format override for this field in the detail view. If absent, defaults to the formatter declared in field-type-registry.

editable.description: Whether this field can be edited inline from the detail view.

editableInStates.description: If editable:true, restrict editing to these workflow state names only. An empty array means editable in all states.

required.description: Validation rule applied when the field is edited — edit cannot be saved if the field is empty.

visibleRoles.description: Roles that can see this field. Absent means visible to all authenticated roles. Classification-based masking (from field-type-registry) is applied on top of this — the more restrictive rule wins.

actions.description: Workflow transition buttons shown on the detail view. Multiple actions from the same fromState implement user-driven branching (e.g. close-as-resolved and forward-to-compliance both shown when item is UNDER_REVIEW). Each action maps to a named transition in workflow-config.

transition.description: Name of the workflow transition (must match a transition name in workflow-config.transitions). validateConfigs verifies this reference.

label.description: Button label shown to the user (e.g. Close as Resolved, Forward to Compliance, Approve, Reject).

style.description: Button visual style. DANGER for destructive or irreversible actions.

visibleInStates.description: Workflow state names in which this button is shown. Should match the transition's fromState but can be a subset if the button should be hidden in some eligible states.

visibleRoles.description: Roles that can see and trigger this action. Should align with workflow-config.transitions.allowedRoles — validateConfigs warns if this is more permissive.

confirmationRequired.description: If true, a confirmation dialog is shown before the transition is fired.

confirmationMessage.description: Message shown in the confirmation dialog. Required if confirmationRequired:true.

inputFields.description: Fields collected from the user in a modal before the transition fires. Values are merged into WorkItem.fields server-side. Takes precedence over confirmationRequired — if inputFields is present, the form modal is shown instead of a simple confirmation dialog.

field.description: Dot-notation path into WorkItem.fields to write the captured value.

label.description: Label shown next to the input in the modal.

inputType.description: TEXT: single-line text. TEXTAREA: multi-line text. DATE: date picker. SELECT: dropdown — requires options. CURRENCY: decimal input validated as BigDecimal string.

required.description: If true, the form cannot be submitted with this field empty.

options.description: Required for inputType=SELECT. List of selectable values.

relatedItems.description: Optional panels showing related work items (e.g. sibling settlement exceptions blocked by the same SSI setup, prior versions of this item).

title.description: Panel heading (e.g. Blocked by, Related Exceptions).

relationship.description: BLOCKING_DEPENDENCIES: work items this item is waiting for (from WorkItemDependency where dependentWorkItemId = this item). DEPENDENT_ITEMS: work items waiting on this item. SAME_DEDUP_KEY: other items sharing the same deduplicationKey.
